name: Shrimp Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend eggs with 2 tablespoons water; set aside.
2. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add green onions and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
4. Add the egg mixture and cook, stirring gently until firm.
5. Stir in rice and cook until heated, gently separating grains.
6. Add shrimp and soy sauce; cook, stirring, until the mixture is well blended and heated through.
7. Makes 4 to 6 servings
